notes: All steps complete. 6 modules implemented: __init__.py (dataclasses), voiceover.py, music.py, broll.py, fetch_list.py, resolve.py. All dependencies lazy-imported for testability. 72 tests pass across 6 test files.

summary: Define shared request dataclasses (MusicRequest, BrollRequest, VoiceoverRequest, AssetRequest) in autopilot/source/__init__.py with fields matching EDL tool-use schemas, plus a resolve_status field for tracking resolution state; Write tests for source __init__.py: request dataclass imports, field validation (MusicRequest has mood/duration/start_time/resolved_path, BrollRequest has description/duration/start_time/resolved_path, VoiceoverRequest has text/start_time/duration/resolved_path, AssetRequest is a union type alias), and __all__ exports; Implement request dataclasses in autopilot/source/__init__.py: MusicRequest, BrollRequest, VoiceoverRequest dataclasses with fields from EDL schemas + resolved_path: Path | None. Define AssetRequest as Union type. Export in __all__; Write tests for voiceover.py: test VoiceoverError importable, test generate_voiceover signature (text, output_path, config), test kokoro engine path with mocked kokoro module (patches sys.modules['kokoro']), test elevenlabs engine path with mocked requests/httpx, test output .wav file written to output_path, test unknown engine raises VoiceoverError; Implement autopilot/source/voiceover.py: generate_voiceover(text, output_path, config) dispatches to _generate_kokoro() or _generate_elevenlabs() based on config.tts_engine. Kokoro path loads model and generates wav. ElevenLabs path calls API. Returns path to generated .wav. Raises VoiceoverError on failure; Write tests for music.py: test MusicError importable, test source_music signature (request, config, output_dir), test musicgen engine path with mocked audiocraft module (MusicGen.get_pretrained, model.generate, torchaudio.save), test freesound search with mocked requests (successful + empty results), test fetch_list_only config skips generation and returns None, test returns Path to generated/downloaded audio file, test API key from env var; Implement autopilot/source/music.py: source_music(request, config, output_dir) with _generate_musicgen() for local generation and _search_freesound() for API search. MusicGen path uses audiocraft.models.MusicGen. Freesound path uses requests + FREESOUND_API_KEY env var. Returns Path | None; Write tests for broll.py: test BrollError importable, test source_broll signature (request, output_dir), test Pexels API search with mocked requests (returns video results, downloads top-3), test Pixabay fallback when Pexels returns no results, test returns Path to downloaded video, test API keys from env vars (PEXELS_API_KEY, PIXABAY_API_KEY), test returns None when both APIs fail, test rate limit handling; Implement autopilot/source/broll.py: source_broll(request, output_dir) with _search_pexels() primary and _search_pixabay() fallback. Downloads top-3 results from Pexels, falls back to Pixabay. Uses PEXELS_API_KEY and PIXABAY_API_KEY env vars. Returns Path | None; Write tests for fetch_list.py: test generate_fetch_list signature (unresolved, output_path), test writes valid markdown file, test format includes type/description/suggested_sources/priority columns, test handles empty list (writes header-only markdown), test handles mix of MusicRequest/BrollRequest/VoiceoverRequest, test file written to specified output_path; Implement autopilot/source/fetch_list.py: generate_fetch_list(unresolved, output_path) writes a human-readable markdown table listing each unresolved AssetRequest with type, description, suggested sources (per type), and priority. Handles all three request types with appropriate suggested source recommendations; Write tests for resolve.py: test resolve_edl_assets signature (edl, config, output_dir, db), test extracts MusicRequests from edl['music'], BrollRequests from edl['broll_requests'], VoiceoverRequests from edl['voiceovers'], test resolved assets get file paths inserted into EDL entries, test unresolved assets collected into fetch_list.md, test EDL stored back to DB with resolved paths, test full pipeline integration with mocked source modules; Implement autopilot/source/resolve.py: resolve_edl_assets(edl, config, output_dir, db) extracts requests from EDL arrays, calls source_music/source_broll/generate_voiceover for each, updates EDL entries with resolved_path field, collects unresolved requests, calls generate_fetch_list for unresolved, stores updated EDL in DB via db.upsert_edit_plan, and updates narrative status to 'sourced'
Debug fix for: Failures: lint issues, type errors
Debug fix for: Failures: lint issues

Completed all 10 review fix steps (13-22): (1) Fixed DB transaction protocol - wrapped resolve.py DB writes in `with db:` context manager and added update_narrative_status('sourced') call. (2) Fixed broll.py - added streaming downloads (stream=True + iter_content) and timeouts to all HTTP requests. (3) Fixed music.py - added MusicGen model caching via _musicgen_cache dict, added timeouts to Freesound requests, sanitized filenames with re.sub. (4) Fixed voiceover.py - added timeout to ElevenLabs POST. All 85 tests pass.
